extension.description: Extract, resurrect, and manage AI session histories locally across IDEs.
config.title: Edo Tensei
config.promptLanguage.description: The language used for generating the handoff prompt template.
config.handoffMode.description: How to package the handoff prompt. 'path' is recommended for token efficiency; 'fullText' is the original behaviour.
config.handoffMode.pathDescription: Output the session file path + per-IDE reading guide. Token-efficient; requires the receiving agent to have file-read capability.
config.handoffMode.fullTextDescription: Embed the full conversation in the prompt. Works everywhere but uses more tokens.
config.customScanPaths.description: Custom absolute paths to scan for each IDE's session histories. (e.g. { "claude": ["D:/custom/.claude"] })
viewContainer.title: Edo Tensei
view.sessions.name: Sessions
view.welcome:
Ready for Edo Tensei?

[Fetch ALL Historical Sessions](command:edoTensei.fetchAllSessions)
